character_concepts: Deck, a chunky friendly control keyboard with one big glowing dial and three lit buttons reading start, stop and approve, expressive button eyes and stubby feet: the little device that babysits coding agents.
Sparky, a hyperactive little coding-agent robot with blur-fast typing hands and a spinning gear head, eager and slightly out of control.
Clip, an anthropomorphic price tag reading 230 dollars with stick arms, sassy and confident.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Deck, a chunky friendly control keyboard with a big glowing dial and lit start stop approve buttons, sits on a cozy desk watching a hyperactive little coding-agent robot type in a blur and start to veer toward a messy tangle of wires, a relaxed owner leaning back with feet up in the soft-focus background, warm desk-lamp light, wary knowing expression, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic depth. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow push-in on Deck as chaos builds behind him -> the agent robot speeds up and wobbles off course while the owner lounges unaware -> Voice (dry, knowing): they promised the agent would let you do less. -> SFX: frantic typing, a nervous little creak.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Deck the control keyboard lights up brightly as a human hand presses his big glowing approve dial, and the hyperactive coding-agent robot instantly snaps back onto a clean track with tidy code streaming, focused determined expression on Deck, warm energetic lighting, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic detail. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Quick cut to a finger pressing Deck's big dial -> the button glows, the agent robot straightens and gets back on track in one press -> Voice (satisfied): one press, and you are back in control. -> SFX: a firm click, a clean confirming chime.

clips.image_prompt: Pixar-style 3D animation. Deck the control keyboard sits proudly at the front of a tidy desk while the little coding-agent robot works calmly under his watch, a small hand-lettered sign nearby reads supervised not hands gone, warm evening glow, content confident smile, vibrant family-film color grade, cinematic lighting. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
clips.video_prompt: Slow orbit around Deck on the tidy desk -> he watches the calm agent work and taps a small honest sign beside him -> Voice (warm, honest): real work today is supervised, not hands gone. -> SFX: gentle keyboard clicks, a soft satisfied hum.

Pixar-style 3D animation. Deck the control keyboard mid-press as a giant finger taps his glowing dial, a calm coding-agent robot snapping to attention behind him, dynamic hero angle, warm rim light, vibrant family-film color grade. Aspect Ratio 9:16.
